name: Black Rose Moonlight Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ブラック・ローズ
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Special Summoned, or a Level 5 or higher monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field: Target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; return that target to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Black Rose Moonlight Dragon" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
